executives.name: Bruce Ledesma
executives.background: Bruce Ledesma is the President of Strategy and General Counsel. He previously served as General Counsel for SunPower Corporation and SolarCity.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and General Counsel
Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Dan Shugar
executives.background: Dan Shugar is the founder and CEO of Nextracker. A solar industry veteran, he previously served as CEO of Solaria Corporation and President of SunPower Corporation, Systems Division. He has over 30 years of experience in the solar industry.

executives.name: Founder and former CEO
executives.background: Founder and former CEO of Cypress Semiconductor; Chairman of Enphase Energy.

executives.name: Howard Wenger
executives.background: Howard Wenger has served as President of Nextracker since February 2022. He previously held executive leadership roles at SunPower Corporation, including President of Business Units and President of SunPower Systems.

executives.name: Manavendra Sial
executives.background: Manavendra Sial has served as a member of our Board since 2022. He is the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Fluence Energy, Inc. and previously served as CFO of SunPower Corporation.

executives.name: Nam Nguyen
executives.background: Former Chief Operating Officer of SunPower Corporation.

executives.name: Thurman Rodgers
executives.background: T.J. Rodgers has served as a director since January 2017. He is the founder and former CEO of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

board_of_directors.name: Thurman Rodgers
board_of_directors.background: T.J. Rodgers has served as a director since January 2017. He is the founder and former CEO of Cypress Semiconductor Corporation.
